violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can openers was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Melon was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit on the buffet line. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Melon was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Fried Chicken was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris. Hood systems must be maintained clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2023

The ceiling in the walk-in cooler area observed not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Ceiling shall be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Empty sanitizer bucket was replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the kitchen shelves, and walk in cooler shelves, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023

The floors especially beneath the fryers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The ansul pipes beneath the hood have an accumulation of grease droplets. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
